title: stelis chiapensis
intro: Stelis chiapensis, also known as a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Stelis chiapensis lie in its roots, which are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Stelis chiapensis roots are often dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness their medicinal properties.
